accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text including agency members, deadlines, and project activities.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as directing HHS to establish the National Parkinson's Project.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly notes the act amends Title III of the Public Health Service Act by adding Part W.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the 2035 termination and key deadlines.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes 24-month and 18-month deadlines and the 2035 sunset.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major provisions including Project duties, Advisory Council, information sharing, and sunset.

concise.why: Reasonably concise while capturing essential details.

correct_entities.why: CDC, NIH, VA and other agencies correctly named; Advisory Council correctly named.

correct_figures.why: All deadlines and the 2035 sunset correctly stated.
